## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation / chore

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Testing

- [ ] Type-check passes (`pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Tested on iOS simulator
- [ ] Tested on Android emulator
- [ ] Tested on a physical device (optional, call out if done)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots or a screen recording -->

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII in code or logs
- [ ] User input is validated with Zod at the API boundary
- [ ] No SQL/injection vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Affiliate / sponsored content is labeled per disclosure requirements
